headline: Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500 Set To Break Key Level As Techs Tumble; What To Do Now
summary: The S&P 500 is set to undercut a key level Friday while the Nasdaq tests recent lows. Micron is giving up a slice of Thursday's gains.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Futures: S&P 500 Set To Break Key Level As Techs Tumble; What To Do Now

headline: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Techs Tumble After Mixed Market Signals; What To Do Now
summary: The Nasdaq reversed lower again while the Dow came off record highs. Micron soared but Apple led other tech titans lower.
